name: AG Grid Community

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written table when you need a data grid with virtual scrolling at the 100,000-row scale, pinned columns, client-side sorting and filtering, and custom cells -- native DOM fails on performance at high row counts and consistent column state. Do not use it for a static table with only a few dozen rows.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only generate one-off small HTML/Markdown tables, not row and column virtualization, reliable pinned columns, or reuse during high-frequency scrolling; the success rate for hand-writing a 100,000-row data grid is 0%.

data_in.note: data_in maps directly to AG Grid rowData, columnDefs, and gridOptions; every column field name must resolve on each row object.

schema.gridOptions?: object -- trimmed entry point for other native GridOptions; default {}

spec.note: The grid requires an explicit pixel height; default 400px, which AI may override. Do not use vh or percentage heights. Width follows the container, and the grid's own layout observer handles container changes.

when_to_use: 需要十万行级虚拟滚动、列固定、客户端排序筛选与自定义单元格的数据网格时用它,而非手写 table——原生 DOM 在大行数性能和列状态一致性上失败;非做几十行以内的静态展示表。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能生成一次性 HTML/Markdown 小表,做不到行列虚拟化、稳定的固定列与高频滚动复用;十万行数据网格的手写成功率为 0%。

data_in.note: data_in 直接映射 AG Grid 的 rowData、columnDefs 与 gridOptions;列字段名必须能在每个行对象上取值。

columnDefs.field: string —— 对应 rowData 的键

schema.gridOptions?: object —— 其余原生 GridOptions 裁剪入口,默认 {}

spec.note: 网格依赖显式像素高度;默认 400px,AI 可覆盖,禁用 vh/百分比高。宽度跟随容器,容器变化由网格自身布局监听处理。

example._why: 表格列定义与数据键必须一次对齐,minimal 固定原生字段名。

uplink: 本条是 display/local-interact,默认无上行;若消费场景需要把当前筛选或行焦点带回对话,由消费 AI 按载体自行写回调,不预设统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:createGrid 落 shadow,v36 主题样式写 grid wrapper,popupParent 显式钉到同一容器
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + DOM 虚拟化,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm 全量 grep:零 `document.head`、零 `document.body`、零 `document.addEventListener`、零 `window.addEventListener`、零 adoptedStyleSheets;存在 `_getRootNode`——v36 Theming API 把主题 <style> 注入 grid 元素的 getRootNode()(在 shadow 内即注入该 shadow root,不外泄 document.head);内部 doc 监听经 getDocument()/getRootNode() 作用域化并在 destroy 清理。widget boot 另设 popupParent:el。强支持 entry『supported』。
